Olathe Lodge No. 19. Meets 2d Thursday of each month in their hall. T. A. Sutton, W. M.; J. D. Dent, Sec.; H. E. Hayes, Treas.
Olathe Chapter No. 10. Meets 1st Friday of each month in Masonic Hall. Chas. Rheem, H. P.; T. W. Noland, Sec.; H. E. Hayes, Treas.
Olathe Commandery No. 39.-Meets 4th Friday In each month in Masonic Hall. H. C. Livermore, Em. Com.; T. W. Noland, Sec.; H. E. Hayes, Treas.
Anchor Chapter No. 3.-Meets 1st and 3d Tuesdays in Masonic Hall, Margaret Stevenson, W. M.; H. C. Livermore, W. P.; Mrs. C. A. Stevenson, Sec.; H. E. Hayes, Treas.
Cedar Bean Lodge No. 23. Meets 1st and 3d Monday evenings of each month on East Park. W. R. Rollins, W. M.; Geo. Young, Sec.; John Jenkins, Treas.
Marion Chapter No.-Meets 3d Thursday of each month. Wm. L. Delmont, W. P.; Mrs. Susie Rollins, W. M.
Olathe Lodge No. 245. Meets 1st and 3d Wednesdays of each month. Dr. R. L. Moberly, M. W.; E. C. Owen, Recorder; Roscoe Smith, Financier; W. D. Hendrix, Receiver.
Olathe Homestead No. 1644-Meets last Wednesday evening of each month in Grange Hall. A. G. Hackney, Foreman; D. O. Shuey, Clerk.
Olathe League No. 89.-Meets 4th Saturday of each month at Court House. I. C. Dent, Pres.; Wm. Mahaffie, Sec.
Olathe District Court No. 938. Meets 2d and 4th Tuesdays of each month. J. W. Thomas, Chancellor; B. H. Tillotson, Recorder.
Olathe Aerie No. 700: -Meets every Monday evening at their hall, nw cor Public Square. W. D. Hendrix, W. P.; J. H. Fraser, Sec.; W. C. Keefer, Treas
Olathe Council No. 730. Meets on call. Geo. E. Griffitts, Pres.; Mrs. Ruby Middlecoff, Sec.
Franklin Post No. 68. Meets 2d and 4th Friday afternoons in their hall, 3d floor Court House. W. C. Teas, Commander; Wm. Lyman, Adjt.; E. M. Clark, Q. M.
RELIEF CORPS.
Franklin Relief Corps No. 3. Meets 2d and 4th Monday afternoons of each month at G. A. R. Hall. Mrs. Ella Zimmerman, Pres.; Mrs. Elsie Vincent, Sec.; Mrs. Loula Norman, Treas.
Olathe Grange No. 118. Meets 1st and 3d Saturdays of each month in Grange Hall. I. C. Bent, Master; Mrs. Emma Kelly, Sec.; W. C. Teas, Treas.
Olathe Lodge No. 1. Meets every Friday night. J. M. Leonard, N. G.; S. B. S. Wilson, Sec.
Harmony Lodge No. 59.-Meets every Tuesday evening in Odd Fellows' Hall. No. 84. J. W. Johnson, N. G.; J. L. Hays, Sec.; Dr. Thos. Hamil, Treas.
Clathe Encampment No. 15. Meets 1st and 3d Monday evenings of each month at Odd Fellows' Hall. F. W. Gras, C. P.; A. Horstman, Scribe; J. L. Hays, Treas.
Western Star Lodge No. 12. Meets 1st and 3d Thursdays of each month at Odd Fellows' Hall. Elizabeth Hubbell, N. G.; Minta Malin, Sec.; Julia Woodworth, Treas.
Knights of Protected Ark.-W. D. Hendrix, Sec.
Irdependent Lodge No. 4. Meets every Friday night at their hall, Park ne. cor. Chestnut. J. M. Leonard, C. C.; S. J. Kelly, K. of R. & S.; S. D. Scott, M. of E.
Life and Annuity Ass'n No. 125-Meets 1st and 3d Friday eves of each month in Odd Fellows Hall. L. A. Horstman, pres.; Mrs. Hattie Bancroft, sec.; J. F. Duke, Disct Deputy.
Olathe Lodge No. 605-Meets on call. H. C. Williamson, pres.; Dr. J. J. Parker, Sec.
Merton Wilcox Council No. 170-Meets every 2d and 4th Wednesday eves at Odd Fellow Hall No. 59. J. M. Gillihan, pres; S. P. Howland, sec.; Al Ryan, treas.
Olathe Camp No. 893-Meets 2d and 4th Monday eves of each month in Odd Fellows Hall. L. D. Brooka, V. C.; Roscoe Smith, clerk; C. E. Hammond, banker.
Sunflower Camp No. 771-Meets 2d and 4th Fridays of each month in I. O. O. г. Hall No. 59. Mrs. Ella Brooks, Oracle; Mrs. Sadie Woods, recorder; Mrs. Erma Ruppelius, treas.
Olathe Council No. 182-Meets 4th Monday in each month D. & D. Chapel. S. H. Lantz, pres.; J. J. Dold, sec. and treas.
Olathe Court No. 27-Meets 2d and 4th Monday eves of each month at Odd Fellows Hall No. 59. Frank P. Hollenbeck, chief; Mrs. Emma Norman, scribe,
Meets 1st Wednesday afternoon of each month. Mrs. Jennie Teas pres.; Mrs. L. E. Hudson, sec.; Mrs. Cora E. Leonard, creas.
Mistletoe Camp No. 117-Meets 1st and 3rd Wednesdays of each month at Odd Fellows Hall. R. W. Crawford, C. C.; Dr. Lloyd Hamill, Sec.
